per_iteration.changes: Replaced massive 484-line SKILL.md + 56 companion files (schemas, scripts, docs) with a minimal 47-line SKILL.md. Removed html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, ooxml/ schemas, scripts/. Focused on python-pptx for creation and markitdown for extraction.
Added extract guidance about including ALL requested fields and numeric parsing. pptx-create=0 was a model path-finding fluke (tried workspace/AGENTS.md 626 times).
No skill changes. Consistency verification run.
Added explicit hint: slides array must have one entry per slide, title slides get empty bullets array.
Added rule: if slide_count is N, slides array must have exactly N entries. No improvement - model consistently omits title slide.

key_findings: Original skill was too large (484-line SKILL.md + 56 files including XSD schemas) causing devstral-small to loop reading AGENTS.md for the entire 5-minute timeout without executing any code
Reducing to a minimal ~50-line SKILL.md with no companion files solved the creation task completely (0→100)
pptx-extract consistently scores 94/100 due to model omitting title slide from slides array - this appears to be a fundamental model behavior that skill guidance cannot override
devstral-small occasionally fails pptx-create (0/100) due to path-finding bugs (using wrong relative path for AGENTS.md) - this is a runtime/model issue not addressable by skill optimization
